nodes.long_description:
**3D Coverage Everywhere**

- Almost every recognizable city on earth is available in True 3D, even my tiny hometown in a poor side of Romania is covered, so you are likely able to visit your own street in True 3D

**Street View**

- Best UNCOMPRESSED 8k Quality on the market, with every street 360 and community panorama on Earth

**Multiplayer**

- Explore alongside your friends

**ChatGPT Integration: The AI companion can**

- Naturally respond in YOUR OWN Language
- Visualize & understand your surroundings on Earth for any educational purpose or to simply give fun facts
- Teleport you anywhere on earth when asked
- .. and much more

**Realistic Graphics**

- Real Life Inspired Lighting based on the Customizable Day/Night Cycle
- Realistic, Reactive Fog Option

**Hand Tracking**

- Fly like a Superhero by pointing your index finger
- Rotate by doing a "Steering" gesture with your own hands

**Terrain Quality**

- The 3D Map Quality can go much further than anything else out there and achieve realistic 3D by pushing the map quality to extreme detail with the best possible performance

**Comfort Settings**

- Comfort Options ( Snap Turning / Flight Vignette ) to prevent Motion Sickness
- Flight Input Remapping ( Flight Controls Range from Simple to Complex Cinematic Movement )

**Google Maps Integration**

- Smart / manual zoom based on altitude
- Paired with the compass for body orientation
- Full Google Maps functionality on the Map Window feature

**.. out of space, check "earthquest.site" ..**
nodes.short_description:
The ENTIRE Earth in True 3D, and every 360 on the planet in 8k - ( The Best Street View Quality on the Market )
———
for more info, see:
earthquest.site

nodes.long_description:
Quest 2 Game made in Unity with the Cesium Package using the Google Earth Photogrammetry 3d Tiles.

---------------------------------------------
UPDATE v10 !! : hopefully the MOST STABLE and the Update that Simplified the Flight Controlling Mechanic the Most, v10 is meant to finalize the heavy game development for a month or two, however, fixes and improvements will still come if there are any needs for it. this Update adds Controller SUPPORT!!! basically the rest is self explanatory, the update also fixes a bug that due to the collider removal and raycast to prevent going through mesh, even if the Earth's Mesh was not visible in Space, it was still there, so the raycast stopped Player Movement when trying to go down, this was Fortunately FIXED!,

v10.2: the Controllers are now Able to Type on Keyboard to Search and Teleport to a specific Place on Earth, and fixed a bug where the space bar touch collider was small,

v10.3: when you pressed on some specific ui buttons, the code gave an error and every other ui stopped working since they had the same script. this was fixed. 3d Earth Generation to have better quality and faster performance, also loading faster and in larger quantity, we'll have to know if that's the case, if not we'll have to redo the changes in v10.4 :/, another improvement was that flight speed adjustment based on altitude was not efficient, and sometimes caused teleporting instead of flying smoothly, fixed !
https://youtu.be/6s-jkai4_mA
---------------------
nodes.short_description: geography teaching hand tracking passthrough VR app/game on Quest 2 Quest Pro, and Quest 3

nodes.change_log:
-
v36.5 Released !

Polishing
- Solved 'Search For Place' coordinate loading stutter, it is now smooth like every other function

- Atmospheric new music track

- Many other smaller improvements ( Functionality & UI ) and polish

Big Improvements
- Street View 'Community Imagery' Toggle  -  in 'Preferences'

- GUARANTEED 90 FPS Average in EVERY Loaded Street View thanks to significant optimization !

See the full list of changes on discord ( earthquest.site )
-
v36.00, the version that expands upon all the previous limitations, and which adds one of the most requested feature of all time, is OUT NOW !

Multiplayer with up to not 3, BUT 4 Simultaneous Players !!!!

- Let the adventures begin in 3x, and 4x the fun !!!
- Maximally optimized the entirety of the Multiplayer Core System for maximum performance no matter the amount of players
- Redesigned the Multiplayer Interface, highlighting the current Player’s visible ID, dynamic player list to select which user to teleport to, and room code, all with a new compact & intuitive design with simple & clear visibility
- Only compatible with players on v36 and future versions

The Flight Speed Adjustment System has been reworked to ensure consistency and best possible experience for every altitude and ground level !!

- Altitude inconsistency is now fixed - Previously flying close to the ground at higher altitudes produced significantly faster acceleration than the optimal 0-700m from sea level, which was frustrating and inconvenient 
- The new system will not only provide the same desired speed adjustments for all altitudes and surfaces, but will also provide a more immersive, natural, and dynamic experience specifically tailored to more favorably adapt the user’s chosen speed.
- The system is also more flexible, allowing a larger flight speed setting range ! ( 0.2x to 3.0x )

Entire Hub User Interface REDESIGN !

- The Main Menu will simply be shown without any other settings or options, for maximum simplicity and ease of use; offering clear, comfortable visibility
- A new panel is introduced specifically designed for Flight Customization Settings, Comfort Options, and Accessibility
- Starting with v36, a quick option that allows resetting app data will now effortlessly allow users to instantly solve any underlying bug / error that may rarely occur within just 2 presses !

Additional

- Updated the Menu Button’s color to reflect EarthQuest’s main color palette, Green-Blue
- Tens of other smaller improvements 

——
Enjoy ❤️

-
v36.5 Released !

.5 - Not a HUGE one, but not small one either

Polishing
- Solved 'Search For Place' coordinate loading stutter, it is now smooth like every other function

- Atmospheric new music track

- Many other smaller improvements ( Functionality & UI ) and polish

Big Improvements
- Street View 'Community Imagery' Toggle  -  in 'Preferences'
( due to API constraints, this feature may limit imagery in EXTREMELY busy areas like times square )

- GUARANTEED 90 FPS Average in EVERY Loaded Street View thanks to significant optimization !

See the full list of changes on discord ( earthquest.site )
